posts.text: US stocks are drying paint compared to the momentum kamikaze clown bus that is Korea. Futs already almost limit down, and follow a +12% day.

posts.text: GE Aerospace and GE Vernova, two spin-offs of General Electric, are everything the firm of a decade ago was not. posts.text: BREAKING: President Trump officially removes Kristi Noem from her position as US Secretary of Homeland Security and nominates Markwayne Mullin as her replacement.

posts.text:
I’m thinking we should do another interview with Dr Sorensen.

Been chatting science with him and discussing our endless stream of concepts to develop that will often completely replace current technology.

Who wants to see it and go ahead and toss some question down to ask him.
posts.author: BambroughKevin
